description: MCP server for Agon Gateway x402, Helius Wallet, and Tokens API market data.
name: io.github.Agonx402/agon-gateway

environmentVariables.description: Optional Agon Gateway base URL. Defaults to https://gateway.agonx402.com.
environmentVariables.name: AGON_GATEWAY_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional signer command used by agon_gateway_auth_call. Defaults are installed by @agonx402/agentic setup.
environmentVariables.name: AGON_SIGNER_COMMAND

environmentVariables.description: Optional Agon wallet profile hint passed to signer hooks.
environmentVariables.name: AGON_WALLET_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Optional x402 maximum USD amount per request.
environmentVariables.name: AGON_PAYMENT_MAX_AMOUNT_USD

environmentVariables.description: Optional x402 daily authorized spend limit in USD.
environmentVariables.name: AGON_PAYMENT_DAILY_LIMIT_USD
